text:
Get Real | Marciano Brunette, Hagen Bach, Tefi Pessoa and Jared Freid
Guest host Jared Freid joins Tefi Pessoa and Vanderpump Villa stars Marciano Brunette and Hagen Bach for an unfiltered conversation about the hit reality series. The group breaks down the latest headlines, including where Marciano and Hagen stand with castmate Hannah Fouch, Marciano's relationship with Jessi Draper, and this week's Red Flag Review.
